info.name: School Management System API (v1)
info.description:
Complete Postman collection for the School Management System Laravel REST API.

All responses use the envelope `{ success, message, data }` (with `meta` on paginated lists).

## Getting started
1. Set the `base_url` collection variable (default `http://app-api.test`).
2. Run **Auth > Login** — the test script auto-saves `{{token}}` for all authenticated requests.
3. Update the various `*_id` collection variables to point at real records as you create them.

Authentication is Bearer token (Laravel Sanctum). Authorization is permission-based; the logged-in user must hold the relevant permission (e.g. `marks.entry`).

body.raw:
{
  "name_bn": "রহিম উদ্দিন",
  "name_en": "Rahim Uddin",
  "father_name_bn": "করিম উদ্দিন",
  "father_name_en": "Karim Uddin",
  "father_nid": "1234567890",
  "mother_name_bn": "আমিনা বেগম",
  "mother_name_en": "Amina Begum",
  "mother_nid": "0987654321",
  "present_village": "Sonapur",
  "present_post_office": "Sonapur",
  "present_upazila": "Sadar",
  "present_district": "Dhaka",
  "present_division": "Dhaka",
  "father_mobile": "01711000000",
  "permanent_village": "সোনাপুর",
  "permanent_post_office": "সোনাপুর",
  "permanent_upazila": "সদর",
  "permanent_district": "ঢাকা",
  "permanent_division": "ঢাকা",
  "mother_mobile": "01811000000",
  "birth_reg_no": "20100512345678901",
  "date_of_birth": "2015-01-10",
  "religion": "Islam",
  "nationality": "Bangladeshi",
  "caste": null,
  "branch_id": {{branch_id}},
  "desired_class_id": {{class_id}}
}

request.description: Public, unauthenticated. Rate-limited to 10 requests/hour/IP. Creates an admission application in `pending` status.
Public status lookup. Requires the application_no plus the matching date_of_birth; any mismatch returns 404 (never reveals existence).
Public, unauthenticated. Safe subset for the public admission page: school name, logo URL, active branches and their open classes. Never exposes secrets.
Throttled 5/min. `login` accepts email or phone. On success the test script stores the returned token in `{{token}}`.
Super admin only (permission `branch.manage`).
Permission `session.manage`.
Reads open to any authenticated user.
Permission `class.manage`. `branch_id` is required only for super admins; other users have it stamped from their own branch.
Permission `subject.manage`. pass_marks must be < full_marks.
Permission `teacher.view`.
Permission `teacher.create`. Creates the login + profile in one transaction and emails credentials (queued).
Permission `teacher.update`. `email` is immutable (prohibited).
status: active | inactive.
Multipart upload. Attach an image file under the `photo` key.
Permission `teacher.create`. Regenerates the password and re-queues the credentials email.
Permission `teacher.update`.
section_id and subject_id are nullable.
Permission `admission.view`.
Permission `admission.approve`. Creates the student + enrollment (+ optional parent account) in one transaction. `parent_relation` required when create_parent_account is true.
Permission `student.view`.
Authorized via StudentPolicy — staff or the student itself. Out-of-reach records return 404.

request.description: Permission `student.update`. `admission_no` and `birth_reg_no` are immutable (prohibited).
status: active | inactive. Use the TC module for transfer certificates (tc status blocked here).
Permission `parent.manage`.
relation: father | mother | guardian.
Parent role only. Lists the caller's linked children.
Permission `attendance.create`. Returns the roster + any already-saved statuses for the date.
status: present | absent | late | leave. Future dates rejected. Bulk upsert.
Permission `attendance.view`.
Permission `attendance.update`.
Authorized via StudentPolicy (staff / self / linked parent).
Teacher role only. The request IP is matched against the branch whitelist.
Teacher role only.
Permission `teacher_attendance.view`.
Permission `teacher_attendance.manage`. check_out must be after check_in.
Permission `teacher_attendance.manage`.
ip_address accepts a single IP or CIDR. branch_id required only for super admins.
Open to any authenticated user (cached).
Permission `setting.manage`. Full replace. Bands must cover 0-100 with no gaps/overlaps, descending grade points, exactly one failing band.
Permission `exam.view`.
Permission `exam.manage`. type: semester_1 | semester_2 | final (see ExamType enum). One exam per (session, class, type).
Permission `exam.manage`. session_id/class_id/type immutable. status advances forward only (upcoming->ongoing->completed); publishing has its own flow. Published exams return 409.
Permission `marks.entry`.
Permission `marks.entry`. obtained_marks must be 0..subject.full_marks. Published exams are frozen (409).
Permission `marks.view`.
Permission `result.generate`. Computes per-student results from saved marks.
Permission `result.generate`. Published results are immutable.
Permission `result.view`.
Permission `result.generate`. Annual GPA = 0.25*S1 + 0.25*S2 + 0.50*Final.
Permission `result.view`. Provide EITHER admission_no OR all of session_id+class_id+section_id+roll_no.
Authorized via StudentPolicy (staff / self / linked parent).
Self-service. Students/parents see their own published results. `student_id` lets a parent pick a specific child.
Permission `promotion.execute`. Returns eligible / not_eligible (reason: failed|no_result|tc) and the resolved to_class (numeric_level + 1).

Permission `promotion.execute`. Requires annual results published (else 409). Passed → next class, failed → fresh enrollment in same class. roll_strategy: by_merit | keep. to_session_id must differ from from_session_id.
Permission `promotion.execute`. Overriding a fail / missing result requires `promotion.override` (checked in the service).
Permission `promotion.view`. Paginated, filterable log.
Permission `fee.manage`. The monthly fee per (branch, session, class) that invoices copy at generation time.
Permission `fee.manage`. monthly_fee is money (decimal string, max 2 dp). No DELETE — history matters.
Permission `fee.manage`. session_id/class_id are immutable (prohibited).
Permission `fee.manage`. Manual trigger of monthly generation (idempotent; normally the scheduler runs this on the 1st). TC students excluded.
Permission `invoice.view` (staff only).
Authorized via StudentPolicy::viewInvoices (staff / self / linked parent, 404 hiding). Returns the invoice + its payments.
Student/parent self-service. `student_id` lets a parent pick a specific linked child.

Permission `fee.collect`. amount must equal the outstanding amount unless the `partial_payment_enabled` setting is true. One transaction: payment paid (cash, receipt_no, collected_by) → invoice updated → income row. 409 if already paid.

Authorized via StudentPolicy::payOnline (staff fee.collect / self / linked parent). Creates a pending payment, opens an SSLCommerz session, returns `{ gateway_url }` for client redirect. `amount` is optional (defaults to outstanding).
Authorized via StudentPolicy::viewInvoices (staff / self / linked parent). Streamed money-receipt PDF, only when the payment status is `paid`.

Public, no auth. Server-to-server source of truth. Looks up the payment by tran_id, verifies with SSLCommerz validation API, then runs the same settle pipeline as local. Idempotent: replayed IPN for a settled payment returns 200 with no changes. Invalid signature → 422 + payment marked failed.
Public, no auth. Browser redirect landing that only reports the payment's status and changes no state. Path segment is one of success | fail | cancel.
Permission `income.manage` OR `expense.manage`. Shared income/expense category list.
type: income | expense.
409 if the category is in use by income/expense rows (rows keep category_id via RESTRICT).
Permission `income.manage`. Rows include `is_system` (true when payment_id set) so clients can hide edit controls. sort: date | amount.
Permission `income.manage`. category_id and description are nullable.
Permission `income.manage`. 403 if `payment_id` is set (system-generated fee income is immutable).
403 if `payment_id` is set (system-generated).
Permission `expense.manage`. Same filters/sorts as incomes.
Permission `expense.manage`. category_id must be an expense-type category in the caller's branch.
Permission `asset.manage`. status: in_use | damaged | disposed. sort: value | purchase_date.
Permission `asset.manage`. `{ total_value, count, by_status }`. total_value = in_use + damaged (disposed excluded).
Permission `asset.manage`. description/purchase_date nullable; status defaults to in_use.
Permission `idcard.generate`. Streamed on demand from live enrollment data (no table). Out-of-branch students 404.
Permission `idcard.generate`. Queued job builds one merged PDF (chunked). Returns `{ batch_id }` (202). section_id nullable (whole class).
Permission `idcard.generate`. Poll: `{ status: processing|done, url? }`.
Permission `idcard.generate`. Downloads the merged batch PDF once status is done.

Permission `tc.issue`. One transaction: create TC (generated tc_no) → student status tc → active enrollment status tc → render + persist the one stored PDF (legal record). Excludes the student from attendance/invoicing/promotion. 409 if TC already issued.
Permission `tc.view`.
Permission `tc.view`.
Permission `tc.view`. Downloads the stored TC PDF (the one persisted PDF in the system).

Permission `report.view`. period: weekly|monthly|yearly|custom (from/to required when custom). Super admins may pass branch_id (`all` = consolidated). Total + by_category + series (daily ≤ 62 days, else monthly).
Permission `report.view`. Same shape as income.
Permission `report.view`. `{ income_total, expense_total, net }` + series.
Permission `report.view`. Totals by class, status (active/tc/inactive), new admissions in range.
Permission `report.view`. Totals by status, attendance summary in range.
Permission `report.view`. Total value, by status, additions in range.
Permission `report.view`. Collected vs outstanding by month/class.
Permission `report.view`. Streamed PDF of any report. {type} is one of income|expense|profit-loss|students|teachers|assets|fees (unknown → 404). Same query params as the JSON reports.
Permission `setting.manage`. Global + current branch settings. Super admins may target another branch via `?branch_id=`. Secrets are write-only: GET returns `is_set: true` instead of the value.

Permission `setting.manage`. Bulk upsert of known keys (unknown keys → 422). Secrets (sslcommerz_store_password, sms_api_key) are write-only. Cache invalidated on write. Per-branch keys: partial_payment_enabled, late_fee_enabled, teacher_late_threshold (HH:MM), invoice_due_day (1–28).
Authenticated; no permission gate. Role-aware summary — the shape of `data` depends on the caller's role (admin/accountant, teacher, or student/parent).
